app.title: StellarSplit
app.description: Create on-chain invoices on Stellar where multiple payers each owe a share. USDC auto-routes to recipients when fully funded.

home.headline: Split invoices on-chain. Instantly.
home.description: StellarSplit lets you create on-chain invoices on Stellar where multiple payers each owe a share. USDC auto-routes to every recipient the moment the invoice is fully funded. Missed the deadline? Everyone gets refunded.

onChain.title: On-chain & trustless
onChain.description: Every invoice lives on Stellar Soroban. No middlemen, no custody.

autoRelease.title: Auto-release
autoRelease.description: Funds route to recipients the instant the last share is paid.

autoRefund.title: Auto-refund
autoRefund.description: If the deadline passes unfunded, every contributor is refunded.

home.useCases: Use cases: group bills · freelancer team payments · remittances across LATAM & Africa

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.selectMessage: Select pending invoices to pay in a single transaction.
dashboard.noInvoices: No invoices found. Create your first one!

addressBook.title: Address Book
addressBook.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
addressBook.invalidAddress: Please enter a valid Stellar public key (starts with G, 56 characters)

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top USDC contributors across the latest invoices (1–100)
